programmes.show_description: The SVU searches for a serial rapist who preys on mothers with young children. Benson and Fin struggle under the tightened reins of Chief McGrath.
Benson teams up with Lieutenant Barek and the Bronx SVU to track down a serial rapist with victims in both boroughs.
Two sisters receive help from Benson to get closure from a traumatic childhood assault; Kat's cousin seeks help.
Detectives Logan and Barek probe the deaths of two sisters who suffocated after being paralysed and wrapped in plastic.
A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Code of Conduct: Crime drama series. A Marine recently returned from Afghanistan is found dead in his car in what appears to be a case of suicide.
Outlaws and In-Laws: Crime drama series. Gibbs investigates whether his mentor was involved with the deaths of two soldiers in an internationally delicate incident.
Endgame: Crime drama series. When an assassin returns to threaten the safety of Vance's family, the team helps Vance to face up to his troubled past.
A former soldier goes on trial for killing a Yemeni man he suspected of being a terrorist.
Powerful American drama about the investigation and prosecution of crime. Briscoe and Green are on the hunt for a murderer who shot and killed two professors.
Briscoe and Green uncover a murderous love triangle involving a scorned teenager and her lover.
Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a successful stockbroker, who was conducting affairs with a mother and her daughter.
When an off-duty police officer is shot, detectives Briscoe and Green investigate whether the victim was targeted because of her uniform.
When a cab driver is found stabbed to death under his taxi, Briscoe and Green discover that his last fare was a former convict and aspiring writer.
Moonlighting: When a murder is committed during a polygraph specialist's night job, the team has to find out what really happened.
Obsession: Crime drama series. DiNozzo becomes obsessed with finding a woman whose brother has been murdered, while the team searches for the killer.
Crime drama series. The NCIS get a surprising revelation while trying to track down a serial killer. McGee joins Abby south of the border, where she is giving a speech.
Reese protects an NYPD analyst whose investigation into a software glitch draws the attention of Samaritan. Reese and Fusco are threatened by an ally of Elias's, looking for revenge.
The Machine sends Reese and Finch to a wedding to protect a pair of POIs before their nuptials. Fusco is angered by being kept in the dark by the team.
The SVU faces the fury of social media fans when they arrest two popular influencer brothers.
Amaro and Olivia's ex-boyfriend Burton Lowe ask SVU for help with overturning a wrongful conviction in one of Cragen's old cases.
The squad comes together for Detective Stabler to find the suspect behind a threat to his family.
The squad must face an angry neighbourhood watch group when a girl disappears near a building that houses sex offenders
Dylan and Lizzie go undercover in New York's erotic underworld when they investigate the murder of a high-powered public relations rep.
Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. A mum calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.
Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a man who killed a mother and son years ago while driving drunk; Anthony is torn when Erin asks him to wear a wire to incriminate a friend.
Linda's brother gets in trouble with the mob and asks Danny to keep him safe.
Jamie and Eddie suspect foul play when the husband of a dying woman doesn't respond to her 911 call.
An ex-NYPD officer goes missing after telling Danny of her plans to make amends to the woman she and her partner wrongfully convicted.
Erin's ex-husband represents the person she's trying to convict of murder.
Callen uncovers the key to his mysterious past. Time is of the essence in the hunt for a woman armed with vital information.
US police drama series. The team must work alongside the LAPD to find a missing undercover agent.
The team track a dangerous and highly specialised hit squad that takes out a special agent on assignment.
When a group of marines are ambushed on the US-Mexico border, Kensi and Deeks search for them in the desert while Hanna questions his cartel contact.
The team investigate the murder of a marine who is found dead, and missing a hand, in a parking lot off Rodeo Drive.
When a hostage situation occurs at a Navy Recruitment Centre, the team are shocked to learn that Callen's ex-partner is the woman holding the gun.
The team search for a group of terrorists who have had facial reconstructive surgery to escape capture.
Dylan and Lizzie work to uncover why an Olympic-hopeful figure skater is killed while on the ice. Ryan's case lands him and Dylan in unusual circumstances.
An investigation into the disappearance of sex workers leads SVU to a horrifying discovery. Rollins and Velasco find a clue among neglected missing persons reports.
